Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.455

Title: Exempts certain property from the prohibition of alcohol sales within a certain distance from a church
Summary: Exempts certain property from the prohibition of alcohol sales within a certain distance from a church for a certain premises located in the county of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the alcoholic beverage control law, in relation to an exemption for certain property from the prohibition of alcohol sales within a certain distance from a church
